titles.title: No Toxic Chemicals in Food Packaging Act of 2026
No Toxic Chemicals in Food Packaging Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act to deem certain substances to be unsafe for use as food contact substances, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
